summary: The 2025 Monster Manual is a fully revised bestiary featuring hundreds of iconic D&D monsters with updated stat blocks designed for the 2024 rules. From classic creatures to new additions, this sourcebook is an essential reference for Dungeon Masters.
Experience the world of D&D 5th edition with ready-to-play character sheets. Whether you're a beginner or looking for quick adventures, these pre-generated sheets are the perfect choice!

The D&D 2024 SRD contains the publicly licensed content from the 2024 Monster Manual and Player's Handbook, available under Creative Commons. It includes revised monster stat blocks and a complete spell list reimagined for the 2024 rules.
Monsters and spells from the original 5e System Reference Document that were not carried over to the 2024 SRD.
